title: Last Life-Revamped
description: A fun game which grian invented where you have to survive with limited lives.
body:
A last life pack made by me, I remade my last pack into this one. 

How to use:

1. Add the pack, and type /reload
2. Give everyone a random amount of lives between 2 and 6 with /function bikerboys:givelives
3. Wait until everyone has their lives. if someone joins later, repeat /function bikerboys:givelives to give only the person who dont have their lives yet their random amount of lives. it will not randomize every other players lives.
4. to choose a boogeyman, type /function bikerboys:choosebg it will countdown and also tells the players what they are in chat. 
5. type /function bikerboys:endsession to reveal if the boogey has killed anyone. if they havent then the boogeyman will be set to one life. If they have then nothing will happen. 
6. thats it! 

DO NOT:
Type /functions in quick succession, let the commands play out, I tried to make them as bruteforce proof as I could but breaking it is still possible.

Mess with the functions or tags if you dont know what you're doing. if the pack breaks, try resetting all values (which also resets all lives so be careful.) with the command /function bikerboys:removeeveryscore and reload the pack with /reload
